design_concept: The Terminal Interface meets High-End Privacy Service. An uncompromising, data-dense, privacy-first platform characterized by hard 1px borders, deep black backgrounds, monospace data points, and stark typography. 'd31337m3' is a serious weapon against data brokers.

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase text-white

spacing_and_layout.global: Generous spacing on marketing (p-8 to p-24). Dense, control-room grid for dashboard (p-4 to p-6).
spacing_and_layout.borders: Heavy use of 1px solid borders (#222222) to separate sections, avoiding soft shadows.
spacing_and_layout.radius: Zero or extremely tight radius. Use rounded-none or rounded-sm max for a sharp brutalist feel.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Mode A: Tetris Grid. Asymmetrical grid, col-span-full md:col-span-8 for hero, col-span-4 for supporting blocks.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: Control Room Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-4 with border-collapse strategies.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for data and headings. Avoid center alignment except for explicit call-to-action blocks.

components.navigation: Sticky nav with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80) and 1px bottom border. Font mono for links.
components.hero_section: Dark overlay (bg-black/60) over the background image. Huge text, high contrast. Use a 'Kinetic Texture' marquee running in the background.
components.buttons: Brutalist buttons: Flat background, sharp edges, 1px border. Hover state: invert colors (bg-white text-black) or primary (bg-red-500 text-white).
components.cards: Flat surface (#111111), 1px border (#222222), no shadow. Hover: slight border color change to white/50.
components.reputation_gauge: Minimalist semi-circle or linear progress bar. Monospace numbers inside. Color mapped to score (Red < 40, Yellow 40-70, Green > 70).
components.findings_table: Shadcn table component. Dense rows. Use JetBrains Mono for IPs, URLs, Dates. Action column with 'Request Removal' red text buttons.
components.inputs: Square inputs, dark background, light borders. Focus: ring-1 ring-white ring-offset-0 ring-offset-black.
components.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for a brutalist ticker showing targeted data brokers (e.g., 'ACXIOM • SPOKEO • WHITE PAGES • EQUIFAX'). No logos, just large monospace text.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Invert styles or aggressive contrast shift (e.g., text turns red on hover). Always set explicit text colors on hover.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fast and snappy. transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Terminal-style blinking cursor or ASCII progress bar instead of standard spinners.

hero_background.description: Padlock with light trails for stealth/cybersecurity vibe. Apply heavy dark gradient overlay.

abstract_data.description: Blue data nodes on black. Apply grayscale or multiply blend mode to keep it monochromatic/red.
abstract_data.usage: Dashboard empty states or generic section backgrounds

image_assets.sponsors: Do not use image logos for data brokers or partners. Use text-based typography (font-mono uppercase text-zinc-500) to maintain the brutalist aesthetic.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 against the #050505 or #111111 background.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid attributes (e.g., 'marketing-cta-button', 'dashboard-nav-link', 'remove-data-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for icons. Prefer technical/sharp icons (terminal, shield, database).
Use 'react-fast-marquee' for the data broker target list on the marketing page.
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' defaults if they include soft shadows. Strip shadows and enforce 1px solid borders.
Create the following pages: Marketing Landing Page, Subscription Onboarding (Tiers: Basic $29, Pro $79, Enterprise $199), Client Dashboard, Admin Panel, and Auth Screens (Login, Register).
In the Client Dashboard, include: A Reputation Score (0-100 gauge), Keyword monitoring widgets, a recent findings feed, and a data removal request tracker.
In the Data Broker findings table, include columns: Broker Name, Data Found (Phone, Address, etc.), Severity, Date, Action (Request Removal button).
In the Billing section, provide UI for Interac, PayPal, and Crypto USDC payment instructions.
In the Admin panel, include: client list, payment verification, crawl management, system stats.
Implement the dashboard with a persistent left sidebar and a dense top-nav. Sidebar should be pitch black, content area #111111.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing page layouts to ensure the 'Tetris Grid' asymmetry.
Use Shadcn components heavily customized for the dashboard forms, tables, and dialogs.
Do not use generic blue colors. Primary actionable color is Signal Red (#FF3333).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
